title: Introducing the Flight Dynamics Subteam
excerpt: New for the 2025–2026 season, Flight Dynamics owns simulation, stability, and trajectory for MARV.

blocks.text: A new subteam for a more ambitious vehicle

As MARV grows more capable, we needed a dedicated home for **6-DOF simulation, stability analysis, and trajectory optimization**. This season we created the Flight Dynamics subteam to own exactly that.
Flight Dynamics feeds requirements to every other subteam — fin sizing to Airframe, deployment timing to Recovery, and mass budgets to the whole team.
Interested in simulation and controls? Flight Dynamics is actively recruiting new members.
